title: roystonea oleracea var. excelsior
intro: Roystonea oleracea var. excelsior, also known as the Queen Palm, is a plant species that belongs to the palm family Arecaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Roystonea oleracea var. excelsior include reducing fever, treating digestive problems, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are used to create infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are believed to have numerous health benefits when consumed.
